name: Merchanting
description: Run a player-driven commerce operation across the galaxy. Craft Vendor Kiosks, manage homestead shops, and master the logistics of a fully player-run economy where every item is crafted and every price is negotiated.

nodes.name: Merchanting
nodes.description: Foundation of the Merchanting profession. Introduces commerce mechanics in Stars Reach's fully player-driven economy — no NPC vendors, no auction house. Every sale is player-to-player.

nodes.name: Vendor Kiosk
nodes.description: Craft and place a Vendor Kiosk on your homestead. Kiosks are crafted at the Lathe and placed via the Fabricator. Only homestead editors can list items for sale; any player can browse. One kiosk per homestead (current limit). Currency: Klaatu.

nodes.name: Pricing Strategy
nodes.description: Understand regional price variance in Stars Reach. Goods have different values per location — no global market means regional arbitrage is a legitimate playstyle. Learn to track demand across homesteads.

nodes.name: Bulk Trade
nodes.description: Negotiate and execute bulk material purchases across the colony. Move large quantities of refined metals, building materials, or consumables between sellers and buyers efficiently.

nodes.name: Transport Logistics
nodes.description: Manage multi-hop supply chains across planets and space stations. Coordinate resource flows from miners to refiners to crafters to sellers. Advanced logistics skills are under development.

nodes.name: Market Analysis
nodes.description: Track supply, demand, and price trends across the player-run economy. Identify underserved markets and material shortages before competitors do. Price discovery is entirely manual in Stars Reach.

nodes.name: Shop Management
nodes.description: Advanced vendor kiosk operations. Manage inventory rotation, set minimum Klaatu pricing thresholds, and coordinate with homestead co-editors to keep your kiosk stocked.
